author: qu0b
content:
Update on glamsterdam-devet-7 block building <https://panda-uploads-production.devops-539.workers.dev/panda/uploads/20bd08/glamsterdam-devnet-7-self-built-blocks.html>

It goes over the last 3 days of builder vs self-hosted building and the time to create payloads under load.

Interesting insights this surfaces:
- Teku self-builds 83.5% of blocks
- 23.4% are self built / 76.6% of blocks are built via buildoor
- Reth has the lowest number of transactions in the self-built payloads by a lot.
- Nethermind self builds the biggest blocks with a median of 135 transactions.
- Reth seems to have very few transactions in its mempool at a time compared to other nodes (is this a setting issue?)
- nimbusel has the slowest median newPalyoad time
- Tree clients P99 `engine_getPayload` is near or over the 1s deadline for block building
-  besus `engine_getPayload` stayed considerably slower after the spam wave finished.

author: tersec
content:
```python
>>> def is_gas_limit_target_compatible(
...     parent_gas_limit: uint64, gas_limit: uint64, target_gas_limit: uint64
... ) -> bool:
...     """
...     Check if ``gas_limit`` is compatible with ``target_gas_limit`` under the
...     EIP-1559 transition rule from ``parent_gas_limit``.
...     """
...     max_gas_limit_difference = max(parent_gas_limit // 1024, 1) - 1
...     min_gas_limit = parent_gas_limit - max_gas_limit_difference
...     max_gas_limit = parent_gas_limit + max_gas_limit_difference
... 
...     if target_gas_limit >= min_gas_limit and target_gas_limit <= max_gas_limit:
...         return gas_limit == target_gas_limit
...     if target_gas_limit > max_gas_limit:
...         return gas_limit == max_gas_limit
...     return gas_limit == min_gas_limit
...     
>>> is_gas_limit_target_compatible(0x11e1a300, 0x11dd2a99, 0x11e1a300)
False
>>> # this is https://dora.glamsterdam-devnet-7.ethpandaops.io/slot/57313 building on https://dora.glamsterdam-devnet-7.ethpandaops.io/slot/57308
>>> # also describes https://dora.glamsterdam-devnet-7.ethpandaops.io/slot/57312 being built on by https://dora.glamsterdam-devnet-7.ethpandaops.io/slot/57315
```
Geth not respecting requested gas limits, Nimbus self-building not working on some recent slots (57313 and 57315 for example)
